decrease dense component weight + increase terminal bonus (harmful pattern)

recommend_next: When dense shaping dominates but decreasing it is harmful, couple terminal bonus increase with a progress signal amplification.

agent_lessons.applicability_notes: Applicable when shaping-goal mismatch is present, terminal goal evidence exists, and previous decrease-dense edits led to regression. The safe path is to boost the terminal incentive and a directional dense signal (e.g., progress) while leaving other shaping unchanged.

summary: r_landing_quality dominates (40% of total reward) enabling hovering/bouncing; terminal bonus too weak. Coupled rebalancing: decrease r_landing_quality weight (2.0 → 1.2) and increase r_stable_landing_once weight (40 → 80) to make stable landing more rewarding relative to partial landings.
